title: Ritsuko
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Aug 19, 2009 11:53 pm I didnt see a thread like this in the list so Im hoping there isnt one and its okay for me to post: but, and I know this is quite assinine, but does anyone but me think Ritsuko is hot?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:15 am She is hot, however her personality sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:15 am Yes Ritsuko is hot and I felt her birth/beauty mark to be very arousing at times. Ritsuko  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:17 am true.... IMO one of the biggest if not the only real flaw was her fixation on Gendo and her deal with her mother. Ok THREE..... those two and her logical cynical mindframe, when she was talking to Naoko about Misato and Kaji in the flashback episode.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:19 am She also smoked about 5 packs a day. Episode 3 She also snapped like a twig later on in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:25 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: She also snapped like a twig later on in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:26 am Sachi wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: She also snapped like a twig later on in the series.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:26 am Well to be perfectly fair............. this is Eva. EVERBODY'S FUCKED UP.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:30 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: She also smoked about 5 packs a day. Episode 3 She also snapped like a twig later on in the series.

[]: Re: Ritsuko             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:55 am Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: does anyone but me think Ritsuko is hot?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:58 am Brown or Blonde, shes still as hot as hell!

[]:             Quote Post by TheRatherDVD » Thu Aug 20, 2009 3:59 am If Ritsuko could get her problems fixed, [Yeah, like that's going to happen!] Then she would be much, MUCH more attractive.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Thu Aug 20, 2009 4:12 am In the end, she was just like her mother. Except for the bisexual part. Oh, and Tines: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Aug 20, 2009 8:48 am Combs wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Thu Aug 20, 2009 8:55 am If Ritsuko could get her problems fixed, [Yeah, like that's going to happen!] Then she would be much, MUCH more attractive.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Thu Aug 20, 2009 9:22 am To me she has that I'm a strong 90's woman vibe going for her her dub(and I love her dubbed interpretation) voice adds to that feel for me, and that's what I find attractive.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Aug 20, 2009 10:39 am I always liked Ritsuko. I bet she would be hot as a dominatrix.

[]:             Quote Post by sean_sean_sean_sean » Thu Aug 20, 2009 10:49 am Yojimbo, you sly dog, you! You are completely right

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Aug 20, 2009 11:02 am She's pretty hot, but with all those smokes and cups of coffee, her breath probably smells like a senior citizen's.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Thu Aug 20, 2009 12:01 pm Well, she is more mature than the other characters in the series which is a very hot feature, but on the other hand, I'm slightly turned off by the smoking and she would probably be a know-it-all (but then again she does know it all and has the right to act as such). I think I'll stick with Asuka.
